name: Emberhold
tone: besieged but defiant — a last warm light against the cold
era: the long night of the siege
_comment: The Root Spec (VISION.md Phase 2). One world, two Labs: the music bible (groups/music/emberhold) and the art bible (groups/sprites/emberhold) both `extends` this file, so a single identity feeds both media. The payoff is the cross-modal `ember` motif below — one root with a face in each medium — and its `fallen` transform: darken the root in one place and BOTH the art (dark-knight palette-swap) and the music (siege, theme inverted to a dirge) move together.

meaning._comment: The palette of MEANING — a shape/colour/voice language each Lab reads in its own medium. Round+warm+rising = the hold's hope; jagged+cold+falling = the shadow that besieges it.

the-keep.name: Emberhold
the-keep.about: The last walled keep, kept alight by the sacred ember.

the-vanguard.name: The Vanguard
the-vanguard.about: The four who hold the wall.

the-shadow.name: The Shadow
the-shadow.about: The cold host at the gate; its captain is a fallen knight.

ember._comment: THE cross-modal motif: the hold's sacred flame. One root, a face in every medium — the gold sun-crest you SEE and the rising theme you HEAR are two projections of the same idea. `transforms.fallen` is the leitmotif move across media at once: the crest recoloured into the dark-knight, and the theme inverted into the siege dirge.

pixeltracks.role: the gold sun-crest on banner and cleric

fallen._comment: Darken the ember for the invaded keep — one intent, both media obey it.

vibetracks.how: theme inverted, dropped an octave into a minor dirge
